Frutos Secos × Your Café

Make your café listed
and get ahead.

Your regulars already trust what you serve. Give them one more reason to choose you over the café next door — premium, small-batch dry fruits and seeds, stocked on your counter under your name.

  • 01Zero shelf risk — display units, packaging, and stock, set up and restocked for you.
  • 02A "Proud Frutos Secos Partner Café" badge for your door and menu — instant credibility with every customer who walks in.
  • 03A higher average bill — pair your coffee with roasted almonds, seeds, and trail mixes, not just another biscuit.
  • 04Be a founding partner — first pick of new products, priority placement, and better terms as we grow across the city.
or write to us at frutossecoinbusiness@gmail.com
Est. in the trading houses of Saharanpur

Harvested
goodness,
traded on trust.

Three generations of sourcing the subcontinent's finest dry fruits and seeds, roasted in small batches and sealed while the goodness is still in them.

Shop the Harvest Our Provenance
SAHARANPUR, UP — TERAI FOOTHILLS, UTTARAKHAND — DIRECT FROM SOURCE, NO MIDDLE MARKET

The Harvest, by hand

Seven staples, roasted and seasoned in small batches. Nothing rushed, nothing over-processed.

01 / Almonds

Roasted Almonds

Himalayan pink salt

Premium almonds, dry-roasted to a deep, even crunch. Rich in protein and antioxidants, finished with a whisper of Himalayan salt.

Coming Soon
02 / Cashews

Roasted Cashews

Buttery & whole

Whole cashews with a rich, buttery bite. Roasted low and slow so the natural sweetness never turns bitter.

Coming Soon
03 / Pistachios

Salted Pistachios

Hand-cracked

Lightly salted pistachios, roasted to order for a clean snap. High in fibre and vitamin B6.

Coming Soon
04 / Pumpkin Seeds

Roasted Pumpkin Seeds

Zinc & magnesium rich

Crunchy, seasoned pumpkin seeds — a quiet staple for immunity and steady energy through the day.

Coming Soon
05 / Makhana

Pudina Makhana

Mint-seasoned fox nuts

Light, airy fox nuts finished with a refreshing mint seasoning. Low calorie, guilt-free snacking.

Coming Soon
06 / Peanuts

Barbeque Peanuts

Smoked seasoning blend

Bold, smoky peanuts with a satisfying crunch — the one that disappears first at any gathering.

Coming Soon
07 / Walnuts

Spiced Walnuts

Aromatic spice blend

Walnut halves roasted with a warm spice blend. A favourite for brain and heart health, snack-sized.
